visual_attributes.morphology: large, long-legged wading bird with a stork-like form
distinctive_features: blue-grey plumage with darker slaty-grey flight feathers
visual_attributes.texture: smooth feathers with elongated dark-shafted feathers on the breast
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: height 110 to 152 cm, wingspan 230 to 260 cm, weight 4 to 7 kg
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: shorter, thicker neck compared to other wading birds, large feet with long middle toe

functional_attributes.primary_function: predator of fish and amphibians in swamps
secondary_functions: ecological role in controlling fish populations

domain_specific_functional.hunting_method: stands still for long periods, ambushes prey
domain_specific_functional.communication: bill-clattering displays, cattle-like moo, high-pitched whines

relationships.description: Genetic evidence places it with pelicans and herons
Found in swamps from South Sudan to Zambia

contextual_attributes.historical_period: known to Ancient Egyptians, classified in 19th century
contextual_attributes.geographic_range: from southern Sudan to northern Zambia
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: considered a rare and unique bird, symbol of wetland ecosystems
